# HELP nico_dhcp_certificate_expiration_time The certificate expiration time (epoch seconds)
# TYPE nico_dhcp_certificate_expiration_time gauge
nico_dhcp_certificate_expiration_time 1740173562
# HELP nico_dhcp_dropped_requests_total The number of dropped DHCP requests
# TYPE nico_dhcp_dropped_requests_total counter
nico_dhcp_dropped_requests_total 1
# HELP nico_dhcp_requests_total The total number of DHCP requests
# TYPE nico_dhcp_requests_total counter
nico_dhcp_requests_total 1
